title: BlackBerry Q4 2024 Earnings Call Summary
text: Total Company Revenue: $173 million for Q4 2024. IoT Revenue: $66 million (20% sequential, 25% year-over-year growth). Cybersecurity Revenue: $92 million (5% year-over-year growth). Licensing Revenue: $15 million. Profitability: Non-GAAP operating profit and net profit: $16 million. Non-GAAP basic EPS: $0.03 (beat expectations). Adjusted EBITDA: $21 million. Gross margin: 75% overall; IoT maintained 85%. Cash Position: $298 million in total cash, cash equivalents, and investments as of February 29. Management Commentary: CEO John Giamatteo stated the IoT division recorded its best ever quarter for revenue with record royalty backlog reaching approximately $815 million—a 27% year-over-year increase. The company achieved its strongest year for adding royalty backlog from new design wins. The cyber division showed stabilization with ARR growing by 3% to $280 million. Renewal rates have been improving with the past two quarters being the best renewal rates in the past four years. The company achieved $55 million in additional cost savings this quarter, building on $50 million from the previous period.
